creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I start working on it but rodent was cut in 3 pieces of s..oftware
rodent and two libraries. This means 2 new ports to support rodent.
Add to this the fact that the developer put crazy version numbers, and the result
is a large amount of fix/debugging.
I'm working on it but please, please, be patient.

cheers,
- rodrigo
